featured.name: The Triple Threat

menuItems.name: The Mac Attack

menuItems.name: Lava Fries
menuItems.description: Our triple-cooked spuds drowned in a volcano of liquid gold and spicy jalapeño heat. Handle with care!

menuItems.name: Smash'd Rings
menuItems.description: Jumbo onions, double-dipped in craft beer batter for a crunch that can be heard three blocks away.

menuItems.name: Fried Pickles
menuItems.description: Tangy dill spears fried to golden perfection. Served with a side of our legendary 'Boom Ranch' for maximum impact.

menuItems.name: Vanilla Shake
menuItems.description: Real-deal bean vanilla, hand-spun until it's thick enough to stand a spoon in. Pure, unadulterated creamy bliss.

menuItems.name: Craft Soda
menuItems.description: Small-batch cane sugar sodas with a bite. No weak bubbles here—just high-voltage fizz and bold flavors.

menuItems.name: Ultra Shakes
menuItems.description: The ultimate dairy experience. Hand-spun with 100% premium local dairy and enough attitude to start a riot.
